name: Sand Save

setup.description: Drop 8 balls into a greenside bunker in a mix of lies. From each, play a bunker shot toward the green.

rules.description: Play each ball as its own bunker escape -- the goal is simply to finish on the green.
scoring: 1 point per ball that finishes on the green

caption: The shot most golfers avoid practicing. Eight bunker lies, no excuses. #golfable #golftok #golfpractice #loweryourhandicap
